base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should improve squeeze_long average PnL and total net profit if the squeeze profile is exiting too early on confirmed continuation. Trade count should remain stable because entry confirmation is unchanged. Reject if exposure rises materially, squeeze hold time lengthens without PnL gain, worst MAE worsens beyond the current leader baseline, or total net profit falls below 98% of run_001.
label: squeeze-dynamic-cap-probe
rationale: Choose Batch B as a single-family continuation because the latest accepted squeeze experiment was one of the few recent changes that improved both score and net profit without trade starvation. Squeeze_long is low sample but high quality: 5 VALID_0DTE trades, $477.7 PnL, 424.9 PnL/exposure hour, and only -113.9 worst MAE. This is a controlled cap-only upside probe, not a broad filter or pullback re-expansion.
